title: Totem 8x
body:
# Totem 8x Resource Pack: Max PvP Clarity

**A small, high-utility customization pack for Minecraft PvP, focused entirely on the Totem of Undying.**

Created by **Z.XP.XP.900** (Creator of FPS MAX and Black PvP), this resource pack provides a critical visual advantage in high-stakes combat situations where screen visibility is essential for competitive, international play.

### 🛡️ Key Features & Competitive Advantage

* **MAXIMUM TRANSPARENCY (CRITICAL PvP FEATURE):**
    * The primary purpose of Totem 8x is to solve a common PvP problem: the Totem of Undying animation filling the center of the screen and obstructing your view during activation.
    * The texture is modified to be **semi-transparent or fully transparent**, ensuring that your vision of the enemy and the battlefield remains unobstructed, providing a critical advantage in life-or-death combat.

* **8x Resolution (Minimalist Design):**
    * The original 16x16 Totem texture is downscaled to **8x8 pixels**.
    * This makes the item appear significantly smaller and smoother, effectively reducing visual clutter without affecting game performance.

---

### ⚔️ Enhance Your PvP Setup!

**You love the clarity of Totem 8x, but do you have a full, competitive PvP setup?**

Totem 8x is just one piece of the puzzle. Upgrade your entire game experience with our full optimization pack: **Black PvP Resource Pack!**

➡️ **DOWNLOAD the full experience (Black PvP Resource Pack):**
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-pvp-z_xp](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-pvp-z_xp)

*Don't just optimize your Totem—optimize your entire fight!*

---

**Don't settle for blocked vision—upgrade your international PvP game with Totem 8x today!**
